name: Dummy [ROBLOX]
description:
A simple, curious lil' squishy thing for you to toy with!

A mute dummy that you will do whatever you want and mold to your wishes with an emotion beyond those boring base ones

Bot Requests/Suggestion box open here: https://forms.gle/GMzuAkiYCJ24a2Nc8 ]

[OK. SO. IT HAS BEEN. A WHILE! yeah sorry, I've been procrastinating about stuff for Cone girl V2, cus I really don't want to see it flop, plus summer break has proved to have a lot of distractions and such so it's taking me QUITE a long time to get it out, so that you guys don't starve, I slapped together a little something to entertain you in the meantime, don't see a lot of dummy bots that aren't from dummies vs noob or get a snack at 4 am, so I decided to make this!]

[As they're a dummy, there's really not a lot to say about them, though I did give them some squishy bits to keep you entertained, if you guys like this a lot I might make a series of these with different body types n' gimmicks and such, but for now just a plain ol dummy for you to fuck around with, just a few little notes btw, it don't feel pain, you can change it's gender by telling it to and you can respawn it incase you actually kill it or fuck it to the point something breaks... you freaks]

[It took me WAY too fucking long to make this NOT insanely boring, as It REALLY wanted to be extremely emotionless and unresponsive. Also the png texture in the background of the pfp is on purpose I swear]

NEXT UP:... Cone Girl [V2] (fr this time)
